Somaramam, Bhimavaram

# Somaramam, Bhimavaram

[](https://substack.com/@sadashree)

![Ratnakar Sadasyula's avatar](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!R73I!,w_36,h_36,c_fill,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F81a2c542-8b3f-4ade-98d2-a40950cffbe3_2640x1980.jpeg)

[Ratnakar Sadasyula](https://substack.com/@sadashree)

Feb 12, 2026

[](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!vV8H!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2Fcfc6b7b5-2ec2-47e3-9a5a-d9e0c9fd6ed7_2288x1712.jpeg)

![Somarama - Wikipedia](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!vV8H!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2Fcfc6b7b5-2ec2-47e3-9a5a-d9e0c9fd6ed7_2288x1712.jpeg "Somarama - Wikipedia")

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

[](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!FczS!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F80c4e02a-3c9d-405e-a5f7-9d1127b40540_434x554.jpeg)

![Somarama Temple – Someswaram Temple – Timings, History](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!FczS!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F80c4e02a-3c9d-405e-a5f7-9d1127b40540_434x554.jpeg "Somarama Temple – Someswaram Temple – Timings, History")

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

[](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!mmDD!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F3dc11181-089a-4b09-b6f2-a8f2ebf0b532_720x960.jpeg)

![Bhimavaram Sri Someswara Temple \| Temple Connect](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!mmDD!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F3dc11181-089a-4b09-b6f2-a8f2ebf0b532_720x960.jpeg "Bhimavaram Sri Someswara Temple | Temple Connect")

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

Shiva is worshipped here as Someswara Swamy, with his consort Rajarajeswari, while the Shiva Linga here is believed to be installed by Chandra himself. As per the Sthala Purana, it’s believed that Chandra was cursed to loose his glow after he desired Tara, the wife of his preceptor Brihaspati. As repentance for his action, Chandra prayed to Shiva, who ordered him to install the Lingam here to redeem of his sins.

The pond in front of the temple is called Chandrakundam and is a beautiful sight with lotus flowers. The Shiva Lingam here changes colors along with the moon phase, on Pournami it appears in a white color, while during Amavasya it appears black in color, while on the other days it has a slightly greyish shade.

One more feature of this temple is that the garbalayam( Sanctum Sanctorum) is divided into two storeys, while Shiva is in the lower floor, the top floor has Annapurna Devi a very rare sight, not usually seen in Shaiva temples.

The temple tank is called Soma Gunda Pushkarini and it’s believed that taking a dip her, removes one’s sins. There is a Nandi atop the Pushkarini, and one can see the Shivalingam from it. However if you see from the rock in front of the temple, you witness Annapurna Devi instead.

There are 5 Nandis in the temple complex, one near the Pushkarini, two in front of the temple, one near the Dwaja Stambham and another in the courtyard, hence the temple is also called as Panchanandiswaralayam.

The temple was built by an Eastern Chalukya ruler Bhima during the 3rd century, hence it is also called as Bhimaramam. The town around the temple is called as Bhimavaram, meaning Bhima’s grant, as he had given grants for the construction of the temple and land around it.

There is a large gopuram at the entrance, and a big hall on the temple’s left side with shrines of Rama and Hanuman. There is a 15 feet tall pillar right in front of the gopuram.

[](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!M7C6!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F6f431298-72e2-4a94-8c7a-ac58029adabd_389x500.webp)

![Sri Mavullamma Ammavari Temple - Bhimavaram History \|
Pooja](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!M7C6!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F6f431298-72e2-4a94-8c7a-ac58029adabd_389x500.webp "Sri Mavullamma Ammavari Temple - Bhimavaram History | Pooja")

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

The other famous temple in Bhimavaram is that of Mavulamma, the town’s patron deity, and it’s believed to be one of the most powerful Shakti temples, next to Kanakadurga Temple in Vijayawada. It’s believed that Ammavaru appeared in a dream to Marella Manchiraju, Grandhi Appanna in 1880, and asked them to build a temple for her here. They built the temple in a location having Pancha Deepams, as it was located in a mango grove, she was called as Mamilamma, which later became Mavulamma.

One of the earliest priests was from the Rajaka( Washerman) community, hence there are two Jataras in honor of Ammavaru, one taken out by the Rajaka community, another by the fruits, flowers merchants association of the town.

[](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!dbwt!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F649ae0d0-b14f-4d72-82b5-8201cb544856_800x540.jpeg)

![undefined](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!dbwt!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F649ae0d0-b14f-4d72-82b5-8201cb544856_800x540.jpeg "undefined")

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

[](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!bvib!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2Fb2f48745-216e-4da9-83e6-749a3b7a2b14_550x413.jpeg)

![Sankranthi setting outside the temple replicating an old movie set - Picture of Mavullamma Ammavari Temple, Bhimavaram - Tripadvisor](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!bvib!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2Fb2f48745-216e-4da9-83e6-749a3b7a2b14_550x413.jpeg "Sankranthi setting outside the temple replicating an old movie set -  Picture of Mavullamma Ammavari Temple, Bhimavaram - Tripadvisor")

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

[](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!WDAl!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F23160d13-1e07-4486-a239-7332ac0a7e45_2560x1920.jpeg)

![Sri Mavullamma Vari Temple , Bhimavaram, Andhra Pradesh 534201 – Our Temples](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!WDAl!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F23160d13-1e07-4486-a239-7332ac0a7e45_2560x1920.jpeg "Sri Mavullamma Vari Temple , Bhimavaram, Andhra Pradesh 534201 – Our Temples")

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

The Ammavaru in the Garbagruha is flanked by statues of Buddha and Ramakrishna Paramahansa on either side of the entrace to it. The Grama Jathara during month of Jyeshta here, is quite famous, and Navaratri is celebrated equally grandly.

Bhimavaram is one of the main urban centers in West Godavari, and has a large number of literary organizations, which hold book readings, discussions, Kavi Sammelams, Sahitya Sabhas.

[](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!0VRu!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F9a8e3763-1f5f-479c-be73-2eaab0f34d8c_400x300.jpeg)

![Dantuluri Narayana Raju College (Autonomous) – Affiliated to Adikavi Nannaya University, Rajamahendravaram.](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!0VRu!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F9a8e3763-1f5f-479c-be73-2eaab0f34d8c_400x300.jpeg "Dantuluri Narayana Raju College (Autonomous) – Affiliated to Adikavi  Nannaya University, Rajamahendravaram.")

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

It is also an educational center, the DNR group of educational institutions started by Dantuluri Narayana Raju, a freedom fighter, in 1945 is one of the older ones in Andhra Pradesh.

[](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!-NEo!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2Fbdcf13b0-024f-41d8-9767-dc9552b87973_1214x683.jpeg)

![SRKR Engineering College - Bhimavaram](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!-NEo!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2Fbdcf13b0-024f-41d8-9767-dc9552b87973_1214x683.jpeg "SRKR Engineering College - Bhimavaram")

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

Also the SRKR ( Sagi Ramakrishna Raju) College of Engineering is among the prominent engineering colleges in Andhra Pradesh, established in 1980.

Many renowned people have an association with this town.

[](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!PQrb!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2Ff9cd153f-18ef-4b54-a76a-b12099cc7328_200x280.jpeg)

![](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!PQrb!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2Ff9cd153f-18ef-4b54-a76a-b12099cc7328_200x280.jpeg)

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

The famous painter , writer Adavi Bapiraju, who also took part in the freedom struggle.

[](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!x28S!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F19250395-c6ee-44f6-af21-4091217a8f20_800x1067.jpeg)

![undefined](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!x28S!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F19250395-c6ee-44f6-af21-4091217a8f20_800x1067.jpeg "undefined")

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

The legendary revolutionary Alluri Sitarama Raju was born in Mogallu near Bhimavaram.

[](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!PsoR!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2Ff1f060c3-6874-476b-a7c0-932555b77084_250x319.jpeg)

![](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!PsoR!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2Ff1f060c3-6874-476b-a7c0-932555b77084_250x319.jpeg)

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

The great scientist Dr. Yellapragada Subbarao, who made some of the most significant discoveries in medicine was born here.

Many famous Telugu cinema personalities hail from here, the Rebel Star Krishnamraju, and Prabhas.

[](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!eecI!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2Fb16bcf35-ff68-42f3-83ba-8fb668152f77_800x451.jpeg)

![Prabhas' uncle, Telugu veteran star Krishnam Raju passes away at 83 in Hyderabad](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!eecI!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2Fb16bcf35-ff68-42f3-83ba-8fb668152f77_800x451.jpeg "Prabhas' uncle, Telugu veteran star Krishnam Raju passes away at 83 in  Hyderabad")

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

Director Trivikram Srinivas, as well as actors Sunil, Raja Ravindra, Shivaji Raja, Subbaraju are all from here.

[](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!sefs!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F97ab136c-23bb-4e1f-83f5-1e5b0d7888e4_400x225.jpeg)

![Sivaji Raja - Movies, Biography, News, Age & Photos \|
BookMyShow](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!pI-v!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2Fe95118ad-ca95-4c76-b28d-ed99e81917a4_204x204.jpeg "Sivaji Raja - Movies, Biography, News, Age & Photos | BookMyShow")

[](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!J6We!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F2816b38e-8804-445f-9724-dd57951ee691_204x204.jpeg)

![Subbaraju - Movies, Biography, News, Age & Photos \|
BookMyShow](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!J6We!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F2816b38e-8804-445f-9724-dd57951ee691_204x204.jpeg "Subbaraju - Movies, Biography, News, Age & Photos | BookMyShow")

Located in the picturesque Godavari region, the town is surrounded by lush green paddy fields, coconut groves. And in recent times many Telugu movies too have been shot here, that include Mukunda, Majnu.

[](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!OM2R!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F61860b8f-8457-48e2-b090-02a31e23258c_1000x667.jpeg)
